title: CA Jobs 2026 – Program Manager I
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Recruitment 2026: 1 Program Manager-I vacancy. Eligible candidates with Ph.D., M.Tech, M.S., M.Phil., B.Tech, MBA, MCA, CA, CMA, CS, LLM, B.Sc, B.A, B.Com, BBA, BCA, or equivalent qualifications with relevant experience can apply online on or before 30 May 2026 at iitgn.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Program Manager I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Recruitment 2026: 1 Program Manager-I vacancy. Eligible candidates with Ph.D., M.Tech, M.S., M.Phil., B.Tech, MBA, MCA, CA, CMA, CS, LLM, B.Sc, B.A, B.Com, BBA, BCA, or equivalent qualifications with relevant experience can apply online on or before 30 May 2026 at iitgn.ac.in.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. or equivalent, M.Tech./M.S./M.Phil. or B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A./LLM./CA/CMA/CS/MBA or B.C.A./B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./LLB.
qualification.details: Program Manager I : Ph.D. or equivalent. OR M.Tech./M.S./M.Phil. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 02 years of post-qualification experience in Research/Industrial/Design and Development/IT/Administration in an organization/Industry of repute. OR B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A./LLM./CA/CMA/CS/MBA/Professional qualification or equivalent in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 04 years of post-qualification experience in Research/Industrial/Design and Development/IT/Administration in an organization/Industry of repute. OR B.C.A./B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./LLB. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 08 years of post-qualification experience in Research/Industrial/Design and Development/IT/Administration in an organization/Industry of repute. The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Manager-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Program Manager-I post at IIT Gandhinagar is 30th May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Program Manager-I position?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria include Ph.D. or equivalent, M.Tech./M.S./M.Phil. with 2 years experience, or Bachelor's/Master's degrees with 4 or 8 years of relevant experience, depending on the specific degree.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Program Manager-I position is 45 years.

faq.question: Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Program Manager-I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Program Manager-I position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 93,000.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Program Manager-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Program Manager-I position in the Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Manager-I recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Program Manager-I is a contractual role at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Which state is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for candidates applying to the Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar, located in Gujarat.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
